body:
﻿APPROVED (content).

I reviewed the W08.3 cutover on `db6b61c`:

- The live ladder now resolves through `keycode_to_shortcut -> default_editor_menu().resolve(default).command_for_shortcut -> route_menu_command` before falling back to `EditorKeyCommand` for the execution-only time-scale binds, then playback, then plain `R`. That preserves the intended ordering.
- `route_menu_command` is a clean extraction of the existing menu drain match body; the host FIFO path remains behavior-identical, and the keyboard path now shares the same command sink.
- The shared handler equivalence is covered by the new route-menu-command tests for Undo/Redo/empty undo/Save, while the existing W08.2 parity guard still pins Save/SaveAs/Undo/Redo and the intentional Open/time-scale asymmetries.
- The one behavior refinement, Ctrl+Shift+O becoming a no-op instead of opening, is documented and test-pinned as the canonical accelerator being Ctrl-only.
- Companion prose in `open_request.rs` / `asset_reload.rs` no longer describes Ctrl+O as a separate inline keyboard axis.
- Scope is exactly the six editor-shell files, no Cargo/edge/menu-definition changes, `diff --check` clean, and CI is 13/13 green with MERGEABLE/CLEAN.

Holding for explicit human merge authorization.
